contentData.description: Base64 encoded .eml email file content. The file content can't fetch back because it isn't stored.

destinationRoutingReason.description: The reason for mail routed to its destination. The possible values are: none, mailFlowRule, safeSender, blockedSender, advancedSpamFiltering, domainAllowList, domainBlockList, notInAddressBook, firstTimeSender, autoPurgeToInbox, autoPurgeToJunk, autoPurgeToDeleted, outbound, notJunk, junk.

recipientEmail.description: The mail recipient whose policies are used to assess the mail.
